global.title: Ford’s 2,200-HP electric Mustang runs 6.87-sec quarter mile, smashes EV record
global.summary: Ford Racing’s new Mustang Cobra Jet 2200 just became the quickest electric car on the planet, running a 6.87-second quarter mile at 221 mph at the NHRA 4-Wide Nationals in Charlotte this weekend. The run demolished Ford’s own previous EV record — a 7.623-second pass set by the Cobra Jet 1800 in Sept

global.title: Survey Sunday: who should be allowed to drive ICE-powered vehicles?
global.summary: This week, we’ve been running a sidebar survey asking who Electrek readers think should be allowed to drive gas- and diesel-powered vehicles. After getting more than 2,000 submissions, here’s what you told us. more…

global.title: Electric haul trucks could save Fortescue over $400 million in fuel per year [update]
global.summary: Fortescue is marching towards zero emissions as it invests in new, zero-emission mining equipment options across its global operations. And that investment? It’s already paying off. One analyst says the company’s saving almost $400 million in fuel costs alone. Each year. UPDATE 26APR2026: $400 milli

global.title: Liebherr delivers 330 ton electric excavator to Bulgarian copper mine
global.summary: The equipment experts at Liebherr have delivered a MASSIVE, 300 tonne (~330 ton) R 9350 E electric excavator the Assarel copper mine in Bulgaria’s Pazardzhik province, where it’s already delivering big efficiency gains. more…

global.title: I went to the Beijing Auto Show and it’s a glimpse at the future of the auto industry
global.summary: I just spent two days at the 2026 Beijing Auto Show (Auto China 2026), and I need to tell you something: the future of the auto industry is electric and Chinese. I’m not being dramatic. Just realistic. In a single hall at the show, there were more EV models on display than there are available ones i

global.title: This fleet is going electric, and sharing their real-world results (and savings) online
global.summary: We write a lot about fleet studies proving out the value of electric vehicles in the real world, but almost never hear from commercial fleets who are making the switch first hand – but one small fleet is doing just that, sharing their experience on Reddit for everyone to see. more…

global.title: New bill in California senate could turn your home battery into a moneymaker
global.summary: California senate bill 913 would allow utilities and grid operators to treat home backup batteries like real power plants, opening the door for programs that can pay homeowners to share excess energy capacity during peak demand. more…

global.title: THEY TOOK R JOBS: new DroneDog robot security guard gets to work
global.summary: Humanoid robots are supposed to be the biggest thing in the history of anything, but despite real progress elsewhere, they’re still perpetually two years away. The quadrupeds? They’ve proven to be a little bit closer to prime time – and Boston Dynamics says its latest DroneDog is ready to stop job s

global.title: Tesla offers 1 year of free Supercharging, claims ~40% premium for non-Tesla EVs
global.summary: Tesla is bringing back free Supercharging for new Model 3 Premium and Performance orders in North America, bundling one year of complimentary charging with new purchases. The automaker also used the announcement to take a shot at non-Tesla EV owners using the Supercharger network, claiming they pay

global.title: Kia cuts EV6 prices by $5,000 on 2026 models
global.summary: Kia’s electric SUV just got a bit more attractive. The 2026 EV6 is considerably cheaper than last year’s model, with up to nearly $5,500 in savings. more…
